items.title: Talked to an international scout this week who told me that new Mavs wing Tarik Biberovic is "the most plug-and-play Euro I've seen for the NBA in years. He's ready to be a rotation guy on Day 1 with his shooting."
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Talked to an international scout this week who told me that new Mavs wing Tarik Biberovic is "the most plug-and-play Euro I've seen for the NBA in years. He's ready to be a rotation guy on Day 1 with his shooting."

Biberovic, Aldama & Sasser, all while keeping the AD TPE fully intact is good stuff.

items.body_excerpt: From the 95-96 SI NBA Preview, an examination of NY post-Riley with Don Nelson coming in to coach. Nellie signed a deal w/Tommy Hilfiger for suits and said he was more committed than Riley who faxed his resignation letter. Nelson ended up flaming out by mid-season after the players revolted.

items.title: Update: With Marcus Sasser traded to the Mavericks, the Pistons are now ~$48M under the luxury tax.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Update: With Marcus Sasser traded to the Mavericks, the Pistons are now ~$48M under the luxury tax.

That's with 15 players under contract. More than enough room to re-sign Jalen Duren to take back some money in a sign-and-trade where Duren lands elsewhere.

items.title: Resulting fallout from this trade:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Resulting fallout from this trade:

🏀Mavericks hard-capped at the first apron due to using more than 100% salary-matching in a trade
🏀Pistons are hard-capped at the first apron due to acquiring a player via sign-and-trade

1/3

items.title: Jess Shepard recorded her fourth career triple-double tonight (22/12/11), tied with Sabrina Ionescu for second-most all-time in the WNBA.
items.author: Alexa Philippou
items.body_excerpt:
Jess Shepard recorded her fourth career triple-double tonight (22/12/11), tied with Sabrina Ionescu for second-most all-time in the WNBA.

Shepard has all three triple-doubles in the WNBA this season.

I just watched "The Furious" and my adrenaline levels are maxxed. I could bench press a Mack truck right now.

items.title: There are 11 Players involved in this six-team trade:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
There are 11 Players involved in this six-team trade:

🏀To DAL: Santi Aldama (from MEM), Marcus Sasser (from DET), Tarik Biberovic (draft rights from MEM)

🏀To DET: John Collins (from LAC via S&T), Gary Harris (from MIL), Taurean Prince (from MIL)

1/3
